body.title: Memory palace: build initial tree + migrate from .claude/memory files
body.result: 32 palace nodes seeded across theigors/{rules,history,slates,notes,igor,claude,akien} via seed_memory_palace.py. Signpost pattern (pointers not copies). 10KB vs 268KB old memory files — 96% reduction. Script is idempotent.
body.description: Build the theigors/ tree structure with signpost nodes. Migrate useful content from 97 .claude/memory files into palace nodes (pointers, not copies). Delete dead weight (stale architecture notes, sessions.md, milestones.md). Tree structure: theigors/{rules,history,slates,notes,igor/{cognition,memory,training,operations},claude/{tools,references},akien/{preferences}}. Blocked by T-memory-palace-schema.
